query: 单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；

transcript.content: 你在 Codex 里验证，别先看单测，先看这 3 组结果。 **1. 看默认诊断有没有变轻** 在仓库根目录跑：
能，我已经自己测了，而且能测的我基本都测了。 我已经验证了这几项：
可以，问题是我现在无法看到你每次的context大小； 插件也是错的， 先要有个功能，让我直观的看到context的大小，我才能判断啊
能，而且我已经把这个功能做出来并自己测过了。 你现在在 Codex 里可以直接用这 3 个命令：
需要做成，我点击状态栏工具，直接能够在显示的方法； 并且能够持续展示变化；而不需要我经常刷新； 可以打开一个编辑器来展示这些内容，也可以在terminal里展示，甚至是tail的方式，但是要自动； 而不是我要手动输入什么指令；
我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；

decision.archive_summary: Active task remains: implement context-size visibility directly in Codex with clear product boundaries, not by modifying Project Assistant. Durable requirements from the user: context size must be directly visible, preferably from the status bar/tool, and update continuously/automatically without requiring manual commands or refreshes; opening an editor/terminal/tail-style auto view is acceptable. Recent boundary clarification: assistant previously tied the implementation to Project Assistant host code, and the user rejected that approach ('单独做，不要碰assistant，要有边界'). Older diagnostic/testing discussion is no longer relevant to the next turn.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn continues the same context-visibility task but narrows implementation boundaries. Keep the raw turns for the ongoing UI/visibility requirement and the assistant/user exchange about why Project Assistant was involved, because the next response depends on that immediate context. Evict t1-t3 because they are an older testing/diagnostic block unrelated to the current boundary-setting request. Pin the core user requirements from t4 and t6 so they can survive compactly later if raw turns are trimmed.
